allow: Bash(node -e "const dns = require\('dns'\); dns.resolveSrv\('_mongodb._tcp.mylineup.rwqdry6.mongodb.net', \(err, r\) => console.log\(err?.message || r\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const dns = require\('dns'\); dns.setServers\(['8.8.8.8']\); dns.resolveSrv\('_mongodb._tcp.mylineup.rwqdry6.mongodb.net', \(err, r\) => console.log\(err?.message || JSON.stringify\(r\)\)\)")
